Table account_types contains columns: id, name, interest_rate, min_balance, description.
Column id in table account_types stores integer data.
Column name in table account_types stores text data.
Column interest_rate in table account_types stores numeric data.
Column min_balance in table account_types stores numeric data.
Column description in table account_types stores text data.

Table accounts contains columns: id, customer_id, account_type_id, account_number, balance, currency, status, opened_date, last_activity. Foreign keys: accounts.customer_id references customers.id; accounts.account_type_id references account_types.id.
Column id in table accounts stores integer data.
Column customer_id in table accounts stores integer data.
Column account_type_id in table accounts stores integer data.
Column account_number in table accounts stores text data.
Column balance in table accounts stores numeric data.
Column currency in table accounts stores text data.
Column status in table accounts stores text data.
Column opened_date in table accounts stores date data.
Column last_activity in table accounts stores date data.
Table assets contains columns: id, symbol, name, asset_class, sector, currency, listed_exchange.
Column id in table assets stores integer data.
Column symbol in table assets stores text data.
Column name in table assets stores text data.
Column asset_class in table assets stores text data.
Column sector in table assets stores text data.
Column currency in table assets stores text data.
Column listed_exchange in table assets stores text data.
Table branches contains columns: id, name, city, address, opened_date.
Column id in table branches stores integer data.
Column name in table branches stores text data.
Column city in table branches stores text data.
Column address in table branches stores text data.
Column opened_date in table branches stores date data.

Table customers contains columns: id, full_name, email, phone, national_id, date_of_birth, nationality, city, branch_id, relationship_manager_id, joined_date, is_active. Foreign keys: customers.branch_id references branches.id; customers.relationship_manager_id references employees.id.
Column id in table customers stores integer data.
Column full_name in table customers stores text data.
Column email in table customers stores text data.
Column phone in table customers stores text data.
Column national_id in table customers stores text data.
Column date_of_birth in table customers stores date data.
Column nationality in table customers stores text data.
Column city in table customers stores text data.
Column branch_id in table customers stores integer data.
Column relationship_manager_id in table customers stores integer data.
Column joined_date in table customers stores date data.
Column is_active in table customers stores boolean data.
Table employees contains columns: id, full_name, role, branch_id, salary, hire_date, is_active. Foreign keys: employees.branch_id references branches.id.
Column id in table employees stores integer data.
Column full_name in table employees stores text data.
Column role in table employees stores text data.
Column branch_id in table employees stores integer data.
Column salary in table employees stores numeric data.
Column hire_date in table employees stores date data.
Column is_active in table employees stores boolean data.
Table kyc_records contains columns: id, customer_id, kyc_status, verification_date, expiry_date, document_type, verified_by, notes. Foreign keys: kyc_records.customer_id references customers.id.
Column id in table kyc_records stores integer data.
Column customer_id in table kyc_records stores integer data.
Column kyc_status in table kyc_records stores text data.
Column verification_date in table kyc_records stores date data.
Column expiry_date in table kyc_records stores date data.
Column document_type in table kyc_records stores text data.
Column verified_by in table kyc_records stores text data.
Column notes in table kyc_records stores text data.

Table loan_payments contains columns: id, loan_id, amount_paid, principal_portion, interest_portion, payment_date, payment_method, status, days_late. Foreign keys: loan_payments.loan_id references loans.id.
Column id in table loan_payments stores integer data.
Column loan_id in table loan_payments stores integer data.
Column amount_paid in table loan_payments stores numeric data.
Column principal_portion in table loan_payments stores numeric data.
Column interest_portion in table loan_payments stores numeric data.
Column payment_date in table loan_payments stores date data.
Column payment_method in table loan_payments stores text data.
Column status in table loan_payments stores text data.
Column days_late in table loan_payments stores integer data.
Table loan_types contains columns: id, name, interest_rate, max_amount, max_tenure_months, description.
Column id in table loan_types stores integer data.
Column name in table loan_types stores text data.
Column interest_rate in table loan_types stores numeric data.
Column max_amount in table loan_types stores numeric data.
Column max_tenure_months in table loan_types stores integer data.
Column description in table loan_types stores text data.

Table loans contains columns: id, customer_id, loan_type_id, branch_id, disbursement_account_id, principal, outstanding_balance, interest_rate, tenure_months, monthly_installment, disbursement_date, maturity_date, status, collateral. Foreign keys: loans.customer_id references customers.id; loans.loan_type_id references loan_types.id; loans.branch_id references branches.id; loans.disbursement_account_id references accounts.id.
Column id in table loans stores integer data.
Column customer_id in table loans stores integer data.
Column loan_type_id in table loans stores integer data.
Column branch_id in table loans stores integer data.
Column disbursement_account_id in table loans stores integer data.
Column principal in table loans stores numeric data.
Column outstanding_balance in table loans stores numeric data.
Column interest_rate in table loans stores numeric data.
Column tenure_months in table loans stores integer data.
Column monthly_installment in table loans stores numeric data.
Column disbursement_date in table loans stores date data.
Column maturity_date in table loans stores date data.
Column status in table loans stores text data.
Column collateral in table loans stores text data.
Table market_prices contains columns: id, asset_id, price, price_date, change_pct, volume. Foreign keys: market_prices.asset_id references assets.id.
Column id in table market_prices stores integer data.
Column asset_id in table market_prices stores integer data.
Column price in table market_prices stores numeric data.
Column price_date in table market_prices stores date data.
Column change_pct in table market_prices stores numeric data.
Column volume in table market_prices stores bigint data.

Table portfolio_holdings contains columns: id, portfolio_id, asset_id, quantity, avg_buy_price, current_value, unrealized_pnl, purchase_date. Foreign keys: portfolio_holdings.portfolio_id references portfolios.id; portfolio_holdings.asset_id references assets.id.
Column id in table portfolio_holdings stores integer data.
Column portfolio_id in table portfolio_holdings stores integer data.
Column asset_id in table portfolio_holdings stores integer data.
Column quantity in table portfolio_holdings stores numeric data.
Column avg_buy_price in table portfolio_holdings stores numeric data.
Column current_value in table portfolio_holdings stores numeric data.
Column unrealized_pnl in table portfolio_holdings stores numeric data.
Column purchase_date in table portfolio_holdings stores date data.

Table portfolios contains columns: id, customer_id, funding_account_id, name, risk_profile, inception_date, total_value, currency, is_active. Foreign keys: portfolios.customer_id references customers.id; portfolios.funding_account_id references accounts.id.
Column id in table portfolios stores integer data.
Column customer_id in table portfolios stores integer data.
Column funding_account_id in table portfolios stores integer data.
Column name in table portfolios stores text data.
Column risk_profile in table portfolios stores text data.
Column inception_date in table portfolios stores date data.
Column total_value in table portfolios stores numeric data.
Column currency in table portfolios stores text data.
Column is_active in table portfolios stores boolean data.

Table risk_assessments contains columns: id, customer_id, loan_id, assessment_date, credit_score, risk_tier, debt_to_income, default_probability, assessment_notes. Foreign keys: risk_assessments.customer_id references customers.id; risk_assessments.loan_id references loans.id.
Column id in table risk_assessments stores integer data.
Column customer_id in table risk_assessments stores integer data.
Column loan_id in table risk_assessments stores integer data.

Table transaction_categories contains columns: id, name, type.
Column id in table transaction_categories stores integer data.
Column name in table transaction_categories stores text data.
Column type in table transaction_categories stores text data.

Table transactions contains columns: id, account_id, category_id, loan_id, amount, direction, balance_after, description, channel, reference_no, transaction_date, status. Foreign keys: transactions.account_id references accounts.id; transactions.category_id references transaction_categories.id; transactions.loan_id references loans.id.

Column category_id in table transactions stores integer data.
Column loan_id in table transactions stores integer data.
